notes: Twenty-four selectable themes: six original palettes and eighteen game-inspired styles
Standalone Steam library and playtime sync through the GameVault server
Owned-only My Library with tile-based Collection folders and Franchises
Steam achievements and friend tracking with clear profile-privacy guidance
Checkbox filters in Collection and Catalog, including controller and Proton metadata
How long to beat, Up Next 3, friend tracking, trailer fixes, and mobile performance work
